languages.text: Похоже, эта платформа, подчиняясь неведомым сознанию и логике, держится на расстоянии от несанцкионированных посетителей.

traits.locale_text: Похоже, эта платформа, подчиняясь неведомым сознанию и логике, держится на расстоянии от несанцкионированных посетителей.

languages.text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.
languages.original_text: Похоже, эта платформа, подчиняясь неведомым сознанию и логике, держится на расстоянии от несанцкионированных посетителей.

traits.locale_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.
The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.
The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

languages.text: La plataforma, obedeciendo a una voluntad y una lógica incomprensibles, parece mantener las distancias con las visitas no autorizadas.
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: La plataforma, obedeciendo a una voluntad y una lógica incomprensibles, parece mantener las distancias con las visitas no autorizadas.

languages.text: 那平台遵循着某种未知的意识与逻辑，似乎在刻意与未经许可的访客保持距离。
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: 那平台遵循着某种未知的意识与逻辑，似乎在刻意与未经许可的访客保持距离。

languages.text: Obéissant à une conscience et à une logique qui vous échappent, la plateforme semble garder ses distances avec les visiteurs non autorisés.
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: Obéissant à une conscience et à une logique qui vous échappent, la plateforme semble garder ses distances avec les visiteurs non autorisés.

languages.text: Platform, bilinmeyen bir bilince ve mantığa itaat ederek yetkisiz ziyaretçilerle arasına mesafe koyuyor gibi görünüyor.
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: Platform, bilinmeyen bir bilince ve mantığa itaat ederek yetkisiz ziyaretçilerle arasına mesafe koyuyor gibi görünüyor.

languages.text: プラットフォームは、何らかの知れない意識や論理に従って、許可されていない訪問者から距離を置いているように見える。
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: プラットフォームは、何らかの知れない意識や論理に従って、許可されていない訪問者から距離を置いているように見える。

languages.text: Die Plattform, die offenbar einem unbekannten Bewusstsein gehorcht, scheint sich von ungebetenen Gästen fernzuhalten.
languages.original_text: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.

traits.locale_text: Die Plattform, die offenbar einem unbekannten Bewusstsein gehorcht, scheint sich von ungebetenen Gästen fernzuhalten.
